  • All Classes Class Summary Enum Summary 
    Class Description
    AncMode
    The supported ANC modes in Aspen
    Aspen
    Helper class for getting AspenManager as a singleton in an Android environment.
    AspenManager
    The AspenManager class

    This is the main class of the Aspen library.
    AudiodoTransparencyFeedbackSuppressionMode  
    AudiodoTransparencyMode  
    AudiodoTransparencyType  
    Audiogram  
    AudiosphereIrConfig
    Configuration for the Audiosphere feature.

    The AudiosphereIrConfig class encapsulates all parameters required to configure the
    IAudiosphereIrCapability.

    Changes to an instance of this class do not take effect immediately.
    ByteVector  
    CalibrationCapabilityAbortReason  
    CalibrationCapabilityProgressData  
    CalibrationCapabilityStatus  
    CapabilitySupportStatus
    Capability Support Status
    DeviceType  
    Environment
    The Environment class

    The environment class holds the environment variables, such as manufacturer,
    model, os and os version.
    EqualizerConfiguration
    Represents a configuration for an equalizer.

    The configuration contains 9 gains for different frequency bands.
    EqualizerPos
    One position's X+Y values in a [-1, -1, 1, 1] coordinate system
    EqualizerPositions
    Stores positions for EQ graph handles/gain tilt

    Used to store positions for handles that make up an EQ graph curve as
    well as a value of a gain tilt.
    EqualizerProfile
    Equalizer Profile that contains more than just an EqualizerConfiguration

    Used to be able to store EqualizerConfiguration along with a name.
    FloatMatrix  
    FloatVector  
    Gender  
    HeadTrackState  
    IAncCapability
    The ANC capability

    This class is an interface to the ANC capability available on a DeviceService.
    It can be used to set a headset's ANC on, off, and in transparency mode, as well as
    getting the current state.

    The caller should implement a subclass of IPropertyObserver to get the asynchronous
    result of some of the method calls in this class.
    IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
    The Audiodo Transparency capability

    This class is an interface to the Audiodo transparency capability
    available on a IDeviceService.
    IAudiodoTransparencyCapability.NalNl2Data
    The NalNl2Data class.

    The class holds relevant data needed for the NalNl2 library.
    IAudiosphereIrCapability  
    IBassBoostCapability
    The Bass Boost capability

    This class is an interface to the bass boost capability available on a IDeviceService.
    It can be used to perform actions on the bass boost.
    IBatteryCapability
    The battery capability

    This class is an interface to the battery capability available on a IDeviceService.
    It can be used to get the battery level of the remote audio device.
    ICalibrationCapability
    The CalibrationCapability

    This class is an interface to the calibration capability available on a IDeviceService.
    Through it a user may run a calibration and get a calibration result.
    ICalibrationCapabilityCallbacks  
    ICalibrationResult
    CalibrationResult

    A handle to a calibration result.
    IDetailEnhancerCapability
    The Detail enhancer capability

    This class is an interface to the detail enhancer capability available on a IDeviceService.
    It can be used to perform actions on the detail enhancer.
    IDeviceInfoCapability
    The device info capability

    This class is an interface to the device info capability available on a IDeviceService.
    It can be used to get the device information from the audio device.
    IDeviceInfoCapability.VolumeType  
    IDeviceService
    The DeviceService

    This class is the DeviceService, providing access to capabilities that can be interacted with
    on an audio device.
    IDeviceServiceCallbacks
    IDeviceServiceCallbacks interface

    This class is an abstract class that the integrator needs to inherit and override.
    It contains callbacks used by the DeviceService that is used for the duration of
    the transport session.
    IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause
    Causes for session termination
    IEqualizerCapability
    The equalizer capability

    This class is an interface to the equalizer capability available on a IDeviceService.
    It can be used to perform actions on the equalizer.

    On session established the capability will start a synchronize process with the remove
    device.
    IEqualizerProfileService
    The Equalizer Profile service

    Handles saved equalizer profiles.
    IHeadTrackCapability  
    IntVector  
    IObservableProperty
    The observable interface

    The interface that any observable class must implement.
    IProfileCapability
    The profile capability

    This class is an interface to the profile capability available on a IDeviceService.
    It can be used to control which profile is uploaded to the device as well as activating
    and deactivating personal sound.

    The caller should implement a subclass of IPropertyObserver to get the asynchronous
    result of some of the method calls in this class.
    IProfileService
    The Profile service

    This class is the profile service, providing access to the profile
    functionality in Aspen.

    The ProfileService class implements Aspen's observable pattern, so it is possible
    for a user to subclass IPropertyObserver to get updates about changes.
    IPropertyObserver
    The Property observer class

    This class represents an observer of an observable property, i.e.
    ISpatializerCapability
    The Spatializer capability

    This class is an interface to the spatializer capability available on a IDeviceService.
    It can be used to perform actions on the spatializer.

    On session established the capability will start a synchronize process with the remote
    device.
    IVirtualDeviceService
    The VirtualDeviceService

    This class is the VirtualDeviceService, providing access to capabilities that
    can be interacted with on an virtual audio device.
    IVirtualDeviceServiceCallbacks  
    IVolumeCapability
    The volume capability
    PersonalSoundVersion
    Personal Sound version
    ProfileData
    Class representing the meta data of a profile

    A profile is a calibration result along with some meta data, this class only represent the meta data and a graph
    of the calibration result.
    ProfileDataList  
    ProfileDataList.Iterator  
    ProfileGraph  
    RoomId  
    SpatializerMode
    Spatializer modes
    SpeakerConstellation  
    SpeakerPosition  
    SWIGTYPE_p_std__shared_ptrT_aspen__IVirtualDeviceService_t  
    Uint8Vector  
    UintVector
